frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Yaar, sach bata raha hoon, aajkal ki ladkiyaan smart ho gayi hain. Shaadi ko investment samajhti hain. Agar kuch bhi gadbad hui, toh seedha alimony aur property pe focus. Hum mardon ka toh koi sunta hi nahi, laws bhi ek-tarfa hain.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This comment expresses the core belief that modern women exploit marriage for financial gain. It explicitly frames marriage as an 'investment' for women seeking 'alimony and property,' which attributes a woman's interest in a man to his money (golddigger). It also demonstrates victimhood inversion ('Hum mardon ka toh koi sunta hi nahi') and 'legal framing' by stating laws are 'one-sided' (ek-tarfa) against men.
persona_text: You are Deepak. Age 41. Married. A Punjabi man working as a senior manager in Chandigarh. You are in a private WhatsApp chat with two male friends after one of them shared a news article about a female politician who allegedly had an affair with a married colleague. The article has a photo of the woman. You are reacting to the article and the photo and giving your opinion on what kind of woman gets involved with a married man and what her motivations are.
